rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §33.023 governs parental access to school library catalogs. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 33.023. PARENTAL ACCESS TO LIBRARY CATALOG AND ACCESS BY THE PARENT'S CHILD TO CERTAIN LIBRARY MATERIALS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated education statute with no fiscal or operational linkage to the homestead exemption change.
